description: Read-only agent review pipelines — named sequences of diagnostic agents that fan out and aggregate into one report. Consumed by the /pre-merge-review command. Every step references a real agent in agent-os/agents/ and every handoff target references a real skill in agent-os/skills/ (both eval-enforced). Diagnostic→procedural handoff: each finding names the procedural skill that fixes it (agent finds, skill fixes).

pre-merge-review.description: Read-only review of the current diff before merge.
pre-merge-review.aggregate: one prioritized report — blocking gaps first, then optional improvements
